news.title:
Investec maintains 'Buy' on Adani Ports with a TP of ₹1850, citing aggressive growth plans.
Expansion at Vizhinjam, LNG deal with BPCL, and multi-port projects enhance growth outlook.
news.summary:
Investec maintains 'Buy' on Adani Ports with a TP of ₹1850, citing aggressive growth plans.
Expansion at Vizhinjam, LNG deal with BPCL, and multi-port projects enhance growth outlook.

news.title:
HSBC retains 'Buy' on Adani Ports, lowers TP to Rs 1800 from Rs 1850 citing ME exposure risks.
Factors like thermal coal, rerouted containers, capacity expansion, and ROCE improvement support potential rerating.
news.summary:
HSBC retains 'Buy' on Adani Ports, lowers TP to Rs 1800 from Rs 1850 citing ME exposure risks.
Factors like thermal coal, rerouted containers, capacity expansion, and ROCE improvement support potential rerating.

news.title:
Adani Ports shows interest in implementing Jaiprakash Associates' insolvency plan.
APSEZ aims to acquire strategic assets via bankruptcy proceedings.
news.summary:
Adani Ports shows interest in implementing Jaiprakash Associates' insolvency plan.
APSEZ aims to acquire strategic assets via bankruptcy proceedings.

news.title:
Adani Ports shows interest in being an Implementing Entity in JAL's resolution plan.
Plan includes acquiring aviation assets and indirect control over Kanpur Fertilizers, subject to approvals.

news.title:

This highlights APSEZ's global expansion and Indian Ocean's role in trade.

news.title:

Haldia terminal with 4MMTPA capacity features direct rail link, boosting logistics.
news.summary:

news.title:
Adani Group plans ₹2 lakh crore annual investment in greenfield infra over 5 years.
Projects include renewable energy, airports, logistics, data centres: MD Karan Adani.
news.summary:

news.title:
Adani Ports repurchased $199.5M of dollar bonds, reducing debt.
Over 60% of investors retained Adani bonds, showing strong global interest.

news.title:

news.title:

YTD cargo reached 454.7 MMT, rising 11% YoY; rail volume up 3%.

news.title:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.
news.summary:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.

news.title:
Adani Ports reveals early results of debt note tender offers, targeting $345.1M (4.0%) due 2027 and $150M (3.10%) due 2031.
Valid tenders include $101.6M (4.0%) and $95.36M (3.10%), with early settlement around Feb 27, 2026.
news.summary:

Valid tenders include $101.6M (4.0%) and $95.36M (3.10%), with early settlement around Feb 27, 2026.

news.title:
Adani Ports has incorporated Astro Offshore ME Ltd in UAE on Feb 24, 2026.
The subsidiary focuses on ship management with an authorized capital of 50 shares of USD 1000 each.
